headline: J.M. Smucker looks to volume for growth as pricing power dips
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma and Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferre join Josh Lipton on Market Domination to analyze J.M. Smucker (SJM) stock ahead of the company's earnings report using Yahoo Finance's new research platform, Alphaspace

headline: PepsiCo and Gatik launch commercial driverless trucking deployment
summary: PepsiCo and Gatik have launched the largest commercial driverless trucking deployment to date, with operations now live across Texas, Arizona and Arkansas The post PepsiCo and Gatik launch commercial driverless trucking deployment appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Yikes! Elon Musk's Robotaxi Fleet Is Smaller Than Pepsi's Doritos Truck Fleet
summary: Tesla's unsupervised robotaxi fleet is shrinking, while PepsiCo successfully operates 41 fully driverless delivery trucks.
